parameters.content:
## SUB — Domain Discovery
**Trigger:** Execute Workflow
**Input:** `{ lead_id, company_id, company_name, ico }`
**Output:** `{ found: true/false, domain: "example.cz", source: "ares|dns|ddg" }`

Tries 3 sources in order: ARES BE (if ICO), DNS probe (.cz/.com), DuckDuckGo.
Stops at first success. Firmy.cz removed (migrated to SPA, unscrappable).

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
